Name: Financial ITC Qualification

Items.StringList: Determine ITC qualification from system components|Determine ITC qualification from depreciation class allocations

Caption.String: ITC qualifying cost percent of total installed cost

Choose whether to determine ITC qualifying costs from system components or from depreciation class allocations. Determining from system components is designed for systems with battery storage when only that equipment qualifies for the ITC. See Help for details.

batt_itc_basis_cost_fed_include.Label: Battery storage cost qualifies for federal ITC

batt_itc_basis_cost_sta_include.Label: Battery storage cost qualifies for state ITC

itc_basis_cost_percent_fed.Label: Federal ITC qualifying costs percent of total installed cost

itc_basis_cost_percent_sta.Label: State ITC qualifying cost percent of total installed cost

itc_qualification_choice.Label: ITC qualification options
itc_qualification_choice.IndexLabels: Determine ITC qualification from system components|Determine ITC qualification from depreciation class allocations

system_itc_basis_cost_fed_include.Label: System cost qualifies for federal ITC

system_itc_basis_cost_sta_include.Label: System cost qualifies for state ITC

Equations: is_customgeneration_tech = technology() == 'CustomGeneration PVWatts Wind FuelCell Battery Hybrid';
is_fuel_cell_tech = ( technology() == 'PVWatts Wind FuelCell Battery Hybrid' || technology() == 'CustomGeneration PVWatts Wind FuelCell Battery Hybrid' ) ;
Callbacks: msg = 'Allocations are based on system components.';
